appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: CLI section defining namespace isolation, dry-run preference, and non-TTY validation constraints.

frictions.description: rulesync emits colorized ANSI output and repeated warnings during dry-run flows, so evidence comparisons required ANSI normalization.
frictions.resolution: Normalized outputs before parity checks and stored concise excerpts with explicit exit codes.

frictions.description: Interactive prompt navigation transcripts are impractical in this non-interactive validator environment; used deterministic integration tests plus code-path inspection per mission guidance.
frictions.resolution: Executed `clack-prompt-engine` integration suite and paired results with direct source inspection for prompt gating/dispatch conditions.

frictions.description: Repository `git status` changed during run due parallel validator outputs under `.factory/validation/cli-core/user-testing/`, so side-effect confirmation relied on install-target path checks in repo + assigned HOME namespace.
frictions.resolution: Validated cancellation side effects via explicit filesystem checks for target paths (`.claude`, `.codex`, `.factorydroid`, `.rulesync`, `rulesync.jsonc`) before/after cancellations.

frictions.description: Assigned setup path is not valid until both `skills/` and `rules/` directories exist.
frictions.resolution: Created those directories inside `/tmp/af-utv-cli-core-u5/repo-path` and reran setup.
